path: Problem: Sum values from a numeric column for rows whose text field contains a given lookup term, returning 0 when no match or blanks occur
Action: Array aggregation using SUM(IF(ISNUMBER(SEARCH()))) to conditionally include values from the target numeric range

Observation: SEARCH returns a number when the lookup term is found within a text cell; wrapping with ISNUMBER converts this to a TRUE/FALSE mask that IF can use to select the correct numeric column (e.g., USD instead of local currency)
